title: ilex neogracilis
intro: Ilex neogracilis, also known as the Taiwan mountain holly, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family, native to Taiwan and southern China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex neogracilis include its ability to lower cholesterol and blood pressure, as well as its antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Ilex neogracilis is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
